headline: Bret Taylor's Sierra raises nearly $1 billion months after last capital push
summary: Sierra's $950 million Series E funding round was led by Tiger and Google's GV, with participation from Benchmark, Sequoia, Greenoaks and others.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Cigna Group, Raises Price Target to $338
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Jason Cassorla   maintains Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $334 to $338.
